Senior SDET | QA Automation Lead | GenAI & Visual AI Expert | Problem Solver | Now based in South Florida (Green Card Holder)


From Global Contracts to Florida Local: Senior SDET ready for a new challenge!

After years of building automation frameworks for some of the world's most recognizable brands (Intapp, Pluto TV, Donnelley Financial Solutions (DFIN), Heidelberg, Medallia, Nuance Communications), I have officially relocated to South Florida and am looking for my next home.

Why work with me? I don’t just "write tests" — I build systems that help engineers move faster. My recent focus has been on:
- Strategic QA: Transitioning teams from reactive manual testing to proactive, automated CI/CD pipelines.
- Full-Stack Automation: Expert in Java, Python, C#, and TypeScript.
- Reducing Flakiness: Using stable locators and Visual AI to end the "red build" nightmare.
- GenAI Integration: Leveraging AI tools to accelerate test case generation and documentation.

Based in Lantana/West Palm Beach area and ready to contribute to the local ecosystem from Jupiter to Miami. (US Permanent Resident / No sponsorship required). Open to Remote/Hybrid/On-site.

If you are looking for a SDET / Quality Engineer who treats testing as a core part of the dev lifecycle, let’s connect!

#SDET #SoftWareTesting #QAAutomation #QualityEngineering #GenAIDrivenQA #Leadership #ScalableTestFrameworks #E2ETesting #APITesting #BackendTesting #UnitTesting #UITesting #MobileTesting #WebTesting #DesktopTesting #Hiring #Florida #WestPalmBeach #BocaRaton #Jupiter #FortLauderdale #Sunrise #Plantation #Miami #PalmBeachGardens #DelrayBeach #LakeWorthBeach

Hiring: Senior GL Accountant. Hybrid, reporting to Bath, MI office once monthly 2-3 days, remote remainder of the month. CPA Prefered.
SaaS industry experience required with ASC 606 & ASC 340.
Reporting to the Controller, you will support the day to day corporate accounting function!.
Our client is a successful SaaS industry company. You will support the corporate GAAP accounting day to day.
This is a newly created "Hybrid" full time permanent position reporting to the Controller. Fully staffed integrated department.
You will have minimum 3 years experience with full cycle GL GAAP, financial reporting and assisting with month end close. 
At least 3 years of audit experience at a public accounting firm, OR at least 4 years of combined public accounting and private industry experience
A minimum of 4 years in Senior Accountant or progressively responsible roles at an institutionally backed SaaS company (Private Equity or Venture Capital), OR minimum, 4 combined years between a public accounting firm and audited SaaS companies, with a minimum of 2 years in each setting
Deep, working knowledge of US GAAP, including:
ASC 606 (Revenue Recognition) and SaaS-specific revenue recognition
Contract review and performance obligation analysis.
ASC 340 (contract costs/commissions).
BS in accounting is required.
Experience working with AI tools and incorporating into everyday workstreams, such as Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, etc.
Advanced Excel user!
CPA Prefered!
This is a professional office environment with a great employee culture!
Salary range$110 -125k + bonus & full benefits and PTO.

🚀 Hiring: Tableau Administrator (On-Prem to Cloud Migration)
📍 Location: Raleigh, NC
💼 Employment Type: Contract / Long-Term
🧑‍💻 Experience: 8+ Years
🌍 Visa: H4 EAD, USC, L2 EAD, J2 EAD, E2 EAD, TN
We are looking for an experienced Tableau Administrator to lead enterprise-level Tableau Server to Tableau Cloud migration, especially within regulated environments like Life Sciences.
🔹 Key Responsibilities:
✔ Design enterprise Tableau architecture for advanced analytics
✔ Lead end-to-end migration from Tableau Server to Tableau Cloud
✔ Migrate, test, and standardize dashboards across multiple Lines of Business (LOBs)
✔ Conduct Business UAT, Integration Testing & Data Validation
✔ Build and optimize Tableau Bridge ecosystem for seamless connectivity with on-prem data sources
✔ Implement strong data governance, security, and audit frameworks
✔ Enable self-service analytics while ensuring compliance
✔ Promote and drive adoption of Tableau Cloud AI features across business teams
🔹 What We’re Looking For:
✅ Strong experience in Tableau Administration & Cloud Migration
✅ Hands-on with Tableau Bridge, security & governance
✅ Experience in regulated industries (Life Sciences preferred)
✅ Strong stakeholder communication and testing experience
📩 Interested candidates can share their resumes at: shruthi.v@staffbees.com
🔁 Like, Share, or Tag someone who would be a great fit!
#Hiring #Tableau #TableauAdmin #CloudMigration #DataAnalytics #RaleighJobs #LifeSciences #DataGovernance #BI

Check this out! 🚀
 
We’re hiring a Senior Angular Web Developer (Contract) to join a team focused on modernizing and maintaining web applications using the latest front-end technologies.
 
In this role, you’ll help drive the transition from AngularJS to Angular 21 while building responsive, accessible, and high-performing web applications. If you enjoy working in Agile environments and contributing to modern UI transformations, this opportunity is for you.
 
Details
 ✔️ Contract role (~24 months)
 ✔️ Work on modernizing applications (AngularJS → Angular 21)
 ✔️ Develop and maintain responsive web applications using Angular
 ✔️ Build user-friendly, accessible interfaces aligned with WCAG standards
 ✔️ Collaborate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies (sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives)
 ✔️ Participate in testing, code reviews, and continuous improvements
 ✔️ Work with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable front-end solutions
 
What we’re looking for
 ✔️ Strong experience with Angular (modern versions + AngularJS)
 ✔️ Experience with Bootstrap 4+ and responsive UI design
 ✔️ Experience with Test-Driven Development (TDD) and integration testing
 ✔️ Knowledge of web accessibility standards (WCAG)
 ✔️ Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments (Jira, Confluence)
 ✔️ Familiarity with GitHub and GitFlow workflows
 ✔️ Strong communication and collaboration skills
 ✔️ 4+ years of IT experience
 
Bonus if you have:
 ✔️ Experience with GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
 ✔️ Experience with AI-assisted development tools (Copilot, Gemini, Claude)
 
Interested or know someone who’d be a great fit? Reply to this post or apply at hktech.io.
 Follow our page for more opportunities!
 
#Hiring #AngularDeveloper #FrontendDeveloper #WebDevelopment #Agile #TechJobs
